v1.22.0_changes: P1: NO_SELF_MODIFY Protocol Rule — AIAP programs prohibited from modifying own governance files at runtime. Violation = Axiom 0 breach. Added as Protocol Appendix D.
P2: insights.json Schema — Protocol Appendix E defines optional insights.json format, 8 categories, write constraints, fingerprint dedup, anti-bloat controls.

B1: advisor insights sub-graph — 8th mutually exclusive sub-graph in advisor.aisop.json. Supports 3 operations: write (pipeline finding extraction + fingerprint dedup + version archive), consume (EVOLVE OPEN insight consumption with human-confirmed status changes), remove (MODIFY-level removal with zero-overhead restore). 7 functional nodes.
B2: insights.aisop.json template generation — advisor insights sub-graph can generate insights.aisop.json module (~6-8 nodes) for target programs requesting runtime insight recording.

B3: PostPipelineHook generic node — main.aisop.json pipeline sub-graph: ReviewStep → PostPipelineHook → endNode. Generic extension point that checks target AIAP.md for optional fields and delegates to advisor. Does not contain insights-specific text. Near-zero overhead when no optional fields present.
C1: MF-INSIGHTS orphan file check — generate.aisop.json MFAudit detects insights.json/insights.aisop.json without AIAP.md insights field. YELLOW advisory.
v1.23.0_changes: B1: Rollback Safety Enhancement — RollbackVersion expanded to 7 steps: pre-rollback integrity check (JSON parse validation), atomic write safety (.tmp then rename), post-rollback SHA-256 verification, version history sync (mark rolled_back, not delete), completion gate with user summary.

B2: CREATE Mode Research Differentiation — StructureGate explicit EVOLVE/CREATE binary routing with research_objectives (domain_discovery/archetype_selection/scope_estimation). VisionGate NLP extraction guidance (semantic parsing for purpose/target_users/core_capabilities/differentiation/technical_requirements).

B3: Insights Consume Integration — EvolveStep step_insights loads OPEN insights before evolution. PATH/PARSE/SIZE guards. Per-insight user actions: Adopt (→LEVEL_B/C by severity), Defer (keep OPEN), Dismiss (→WONTFIX). SEVERITY: OPTIONAL per PL27.

B4: Data Flow Contract Standardization — Generate1 constraints document 5 key cross-module parameters (research_context, evolution_context, evolution_summary, evolution_plan, research_quality_context) with source→consumer mapping.

B5: Generate/Review Testing Boundary — ThreeDimTest ownership clarification: Generate ThreeDimTest (initial) → ReTest (user refinement) → AutoFixEngine (auto-fix). Explicit precedence documented in ReTest constraints.

C1: PostPipelineHook Delegation Contract — step2 enhanced with DELEGATION CONTRACT (advisor_type routing, target_path, pipeline_metadata passthrough) and RETURN CONTRACT (success/findings_count/warnings).
C2: MF-INSIGHTS Orphan Check Detail — 5-case detection logic: (a) orphan file, (b) orphan module, (c) normal initial, (d) full match, (e) N/A.
C3: QRG2 Cumulative Drift — Finalize loads 3 most recent versions from .version_history/, computes cumulative delta. RED < -0.3, YELLOW < -0.15.
v1.24.0_changes: A1: insights.aisop.json — dedicated Creator self-observation module (7 nodes). Creator-specific observation rules: cross-module data flow, ThreeDimTest anomaly, Generate→Research fix rate, scenario coverage drift, EVOLVE CAP pressure, pipeline retry. Fingerprint dedup, anti-bloat controls (L1: 500 chars, L2: 20 OPEN cap, L3: archive). FlushToFile on ReviewStep.

A2: PL28 Mandatory Self-Observation — code-as-switch architecture. PipelineEntry step2 parallel self-observation code presence = insights ON. Code absence = insights OFF. Zero overhead when OFF. NO_CROSS_WRITE attribution rule.

A3: advisor insights sub-graph lifecycle redesign — write/consume/remove → enable/disable/consume. EnableInsights creates 3 sync points (module + main code + AIAP.md declaration). DisableInsights reverses all 3. Applicable to ANY AIAP program including Creator.
A4: PostPipelineHook removal — main pipeline sub-graph simplified: ReviewStep → endNode. PostPipelineHook function deleted. All references removed. main nodes 29→28.

W category deprecated 8 PostPipelineHook scenarios, retained 6 core INSIGHTS scenarios. New X category: 15 Insights Lifecycle scenarios (enable/disable/consume/NO_CROSS_WRITE/code-as-switch). S category +1 multi-mechanism interaction.

v1.25.0_changes: B1: PostExecution convergence node — main.aisop.json adds PostExecution node between all intent terminal nodes and endNode. All 13 intents converge through PostExecution, enabling universal PL28 self-observation coverage.

B2: PL28 observation migration — PipelineEntry step2 PL28 parallel self-observation code moved to PostExecution. Single observation point covers Create/Evolve pipeline AND all standalone intents (Validate, Simulate, Modify, etc.).

C2: INS-011 ADOPTED — DESIGN/HIGH insight 'PL28 only covers Create/Evolve pipeline' resolved by PostExecution convergence architecture.
